title: psychotria capensis subsp. riparia
intro: Psychotria capensis subsp. riparia is a subspecies of the Psychotria capensis plant, a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family native to southern Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Psychotria capensis subsp. riparia typically involve drying and processing the leaves or roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
